---
title: "Time Series & Econometrics"
description: "ARIMA, VAR, cointegration, GARCH, structural breaks, panel data."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="time-series-econometrics"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Time Series & Econometrics

ARIMA, VAR, cointegration, GARCH, structural breaks, panel data.
